title: Onchain Credit Score Widget
description: Embeddable widget that scores any wallet 0–850 based on age, activity depth, asset diversity, and approval hygiene — DeFi's answer to a credit score.
useCase: Build an embeddable onchain credit score component that lenders, DAOs, and apps can drop in to gate access based on wallet reputation — score computed from age, tx count, chains, net worth, and risky approvals.

keyParams.chainName: Primary EVM chain for balance and approval data
